title: Mushoku Tensei (Jobless Reincarnation)
description: Mushoku Tensei (Jobless Reincarnation) is a RPG Modpack for players wanting to explore the world Mushoku Tensei!
body:
![Mushoku Tensei (Jobless Reincarnation) SS 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/FAAxCi0V/images/fcf5daefc56f489675de64f22c2c4b68f3d29731.png)

# Overview
**Mushoku Tensei (Jobless Reincarnation)** is a fantasy Modpack based on the anime/light novel "Mushoku Tensei". You've reincarnated into a new world filled with magic, monsters and more. Choose your path of spells or swords and master them. Adventure through dungeons, complete quests and establish a family in this new fantasty land.

[![curseforge](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/curseforge_vector.svg)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/mushokutensei)
[![modrinth](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/modrinth_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/mushokutensei)
[![kofi-plural-alt](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/donate/kofi-plural-alt_vector.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/kesselot)

# Features
- [✔️] **Mushoku Tensei** - Enjoy your favourite, spells, weapons, armour, NPC's from Mushoku Tensei in Minecraft.
- [✔️] **Magic & Melee** - A world filled with magic and swords, learn spells, choose your class, discover books and more!
- [✔️] **Mythical Creatures** - Enjoy a vibrant world filled with mythical creatures, explore, tame and defeat them on your travels.
- [✔️] **Vanilla+** - Enjoy a sprawling world filled with dunegons, villages and more! Explore the highest peaks or dive into the deepest dungeon depths.

### Modpack Notes
- **If you are a Youtuber or Content Creator playing this Modpack, put a link in the description linking back to this page so people know the Modpack you are using.**
- **Reupload of this Modpack or any modified version is not allowed allowed on Modrinth or CurseForge, this includes redistribution to any other website.** (_Unless given explicit permission by myself_)
